name: vision_analyze
description: Analyze an image using vision capabilities. Can describe content, extract text (OCR), identify objects, read charts/diagrams, and answer questions about images.

image_url.description: URL of the image to analyze

prompt.description: Question or instruction about the image (e.g. 'Describe this image', 'Extract all text', 'What objects are visible?')

detail.description: Image resolution for analysis. 'low' is faster/cheaper, 'high' provides more detail.
